message:
Update .gitignore to include new lock files

This commit adds `temp.lock` and `temp.lock.owner.json` to the .gitignore file, ensuring that temporary lock files generated during the archive locking process are not tracked by Git. Additionally, the previously ignored `screenshots/gif_frames` directory is restored to the ignore list, maintaining a clean repository.

files.patch:
@@ -212,4 +212,6 @@ storage.sqlite3.old
 screenshots/gif_canvas_frames
 screenshots/gif_canvas_frames_2k
 screenshots/renamed
-screenshots/gif_frames
\ No newline at end of file
+screenshots/gif_frames
+temp.lock
+temp.lock.owner.json
\ No newline at end of file
